title: Before Making a Deal, Trump Demanded Iran’s Surrender. He Got a Surprise.
summary_full: While the Iranians suffered substantial losses in the war, they emerged from a confrontation with the world’s most powerful military having proved they can use economic chaos as a weapon.
summary_public: While the Iranians suffered substantial losses in the war, they emerged from a confrontation with the world’s most powerful military having proved they can use economic chaos as a weapon.
